New Deal.description: Gain $10M. +5 base stability. Launch sweeping economic reforms to pull the nation out of depression.

Public Works.description: Build 1 factory. Gain $5M. Invest in public infrastructure projects to create jobs and build capacity.

Tennessee Valley Authority.description: Build 2 factories. +5% money production. Establish the TVA to bring electricity and development to rural regions.

Rural Electrification.description: +5% money production. +5 base stability. Extend electrical power to every corner of the nation.

Social Security Act.description: +10 base stability. Establish a social safety net for the elderly, unemployed, and disabled.

Fair Labor Standards.description: +5 base stability. Gain $5M. Set minimum wage and maximum working hours to protect American workers.

GI Bill.description: +10 base stability. Gain $10M. Provide veterans with education, housing, and employment benefits.

Industrial Mobilization.description: Gain $10M. Build 1 factory. Begin converting civilian industry toward military production.

War Production Board.description: Build 2 factories. +10% build speed. Centralize industrial output under a wartime production authority.

Liberty Ships.description: Gain $15M. Build 1 factory. Mass-produce cargo vessels to supply overseas operations.

Arsenal of Democracy.description: Build 3 factories. +10% money production. Transform America into the world's foremost producer of war materiel.

Political Consolidation.description: +50 political power. Unite the political establishment behind a common national agenda.

Congressional Support.description: +10% political power gain. Secure bipartisan support in Congress for key legislative priorities.

Executive Orders.description: +50 political power. +5 base stability. Expand presidential authority through executive action.

Democracy Strengthened.description: +10 base stability. Shift 15% left. Reinforce democratic institutions and civil liberties across the nation.

Bill of Rights Reaffirmed.description: +10 base stability. Shift 15% libertarian. Enshrine fundamental rights as the inviolable cornerstone of government.

Atlantic Charter.description: +15 base stability. Gain $20M. +10% political power gain. Proclaim a vision for a postwar world built on freedom and self-determination.

Authoritarian Turn.description: -5 base stability. +10% attack. Shift 20% right. Concentrate power in the executive at the expense of democratic norms.

Emergency Powers.description: +100 political power. Build 2 factories. Invoke sweeping emergency powers to bypass legislative oversight.

Martial Law.description: -10 base stability. +15% attack. Shift 20% authoritarian. Suspend civil law and place the nation under direct military governance.

American Caesar.description: +20% attack. Shift 25% right. Shift 25% authoritarian. One man rises above the republic to rule with absolute authority.

Isolationism.description: +10 base stability. +5% defense. Turn inward and refuse entanglement in foreign conflicts.

Fortress America.description: +15% defense. Build 1 factory. Fortify the homeland against any conceivable foreign threat.

Hemispheric Defense.description: +10% defense. +10 base stability. Extend the defensive perimeter to cover the entire Western Hemisphere.

Interventionism.description: +5% attack. +25 political power. Commit to active engagement in world affairs to protect American interests.

Lend Lease.description: Gain $15M. +5 base stability. Supply allied nations with war materiel to fight the common enemy.

Forward Bases.description: +10% attack. Gain $5M. Establish military installations across strategic locations worldwide.

Global Commitment.description: +15% attack. Gain $10M. Build 1 factory. Accept the mantle of global leadership and project power across every continent.

Military Expansion.description: Gain $10M. Train 1 division. Begin expanding the armed forces to meet growing global threats.

Selective Service.description: +1 military size. Train 1 division. Institute the draft to rapidly fill the ranks of the military.

Army Reorganization.description: +10% attack. +10% defense. Restructure the Army into modern combined-arms formations.

Armored Divisions.description: +15% attack. Train 2 divisions. Field powerful armored divisions built around massed tank formations.

Two Ocean Navy.description: Gain $10M. +5% defense. Build a fleet capable of fighting in the Atlantic and Pacific simultaneously.

Pacific Fleet.description: +10% defense. +5% attack. Concentrate naval power in the Pacific to contest Japanese expansion.

Island Hopping Doctrine.description: +15% attack. +10% transport speed. Develop the doctrine of bypassing strongholds to seize key island positions.

Air Power Doctrine.description: +5% attack. Gain $5M. Embrace air power as a decisive element of modern warfare.

Strategic Bombing.description: +10% attack. Target enemy industry and infrastructure with massed bomber formations.

Long Range Escorts.description: +10% attack. +5% defense. Develop long-range fighter escorts to protect bomber streams deep in enemy territory.

Air Supremacy.description: +15% attack. +10% defense. Achieve total dominance of the skies over every theater of war.

Manhattan Project.description: Lose $20M. Launch a top-secret crash program to harness the power of the atom.

Los Alamos.description: Lose $15M. Gather the world's greatest minds at a secret laboratory in the New Mexico desert.

Trinity Test.description: +10% attack. Lose $10M. Detonate the first nuclear device and change the world forever.

Nuclear Deterrent.description: +25% attack. +20% defense. Build a nuclear arsenal so devastating that no adversary would dare strike first.

Office of Strategic Services.description: +50 political power. +5% attack. Establish America's first centralized intelligence agency.

Codebreakers.description: +5% attack. +5% defense. Recruit brilliant cryptanalysts to break enemy communications.

Signal Intelligence.description: +10% attack. +5% defense. Intercept and analyze enemy signals across every theater of operations.

CIA Founded.description: +15% political power gain. +10% attack. Create a permanent civilian intelligence agency to safeguard national security.

Propaganda Efforts.description: +5 base stability. Launch domestic and foreign propaganda campaigns to rally support.

Voice of America.description: +10 base stability. +25 political power. Broadcast American ideals and news to audiences around the world.

Cultural Diplomacy.description: +5 base stability. +50 political power. Win hearts and minds through cultural exchange and soft power.

Manifest Destiny.description: +50 political power. +5% attack. Rekindle the spirit of continental expansion and American exceptionalism.

Caribbean Influence.description: Gain $10M. +5 base stability. Extend American political and economic influence throughout the Caribbean.

Latin American Pacts.description: +5 base stability. Gain $10M. Forge binding defense and trade pacts with Latin American nations.

Monroe Doctrine Enforced.description: +10% defense. +10% attack. +10 base stability. Declare the Western Hemisphere closed to European interference.

Alaska Development.description: Gain $5M. Build 1 factory. Develop Alaska's vast natural resources and strategic position.

Pacific Territories.description: Gain $10M. +5% defense. Consolidate control over Pacific island territories as forward outposts.
